   But checking `F_aux`: it gives `D F = (some expression)`. One could verify if this is consistent with `F = (E₂ E₄ - E₆)²`, and taking the derivative:
   `D F = 2 (E₂ E₄ - E₆) (D(E₂ E₄) - D E₆)`.

   We have `D(E₂ E₄) = D E₂ E₄ + E₂ D E₄ = ((E₂² - E₆)/3) E₄ + E₂ ((E₂ E₄ - E₆)/2)`.
   And `D E₆ = (E₂ E₆ - E₄²)/2`.

   So `D(E₂ E₄) - D E₆ = (E₂² E₄)/3 - (E₆ E₄)/3 + (E₂² E₄)/2 - (E₂ E₆)/2 - (E₂ E₆)/2 + E₄²/2`.
